name: Celery Seed - Honey Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the sugar, salt, paprika, celery seed, and dry mustard.
2. Pour in the honey, lemon juice, and grated onion.
3. Slowly pour in the vinegar while continuously stirring the mixture.
4. Gradually add the salad oil to the mixture, whisking constantly until well combined.
5. Serve with fruit salad.
